label: CheenHub: dev stack
command: set -e; if docker info >/dev/null 2>&1; then echo 'Docker Desktop is already running.'; else echo 'Docker Desktop is not running; starting it...'; if command -v systemctl >/dev/null 2>&1; then systemctl --user start docker-desktop >/dev/null 2>&1 || true; fi; if ! docker info >/dev/null 2>&1 && command -v docker-desktop >/dev/null 2>&1; then nohup docker-desktop >/tmp/cheenhub-docker-desktop.log 2>&1 & fi; for attempt in $(seq 1 90); do if docker info >/dev/null 2>&1; then echo 'Docker Desktop is ready.'; break; fi; sleep 1; done; if ! docker info >/dev/null 2>&1; then echo 'Docker Desktop did not become ready within 90 seconds.' >&2; exit 1; fi; fi; if docker ps --format '{{.Names}}' | grep -qx 'cheenhub-postgres'; then echo 'Postgres container is already running.'; elif docker ps -a --format '{{.Names}}' | grep -qx 'cheenhub-postgres'; then echo 'Starting existing Postgres container...'; docker start cheenhub-postgres >/dev/null; else echo 'Creating Postgres container...'; docker run --name cheenhub-postgres -e POSTGRES_USER=postgres -e POSTGRES_PASSWORD=mysecretpassword -e POSTGRES_DB=cheenhub -p 5432:5432 -v cheenhub-postgres-data:/var/lib/postgresql/data -d postgres:16 >/dev/null; fi; for attempt in $(seq 1 60); do if docker exec cheenhub-postgres pg_isready -U postgres -d cheenhub >/dev/null 2>&1; then echo 'Postgres is ready.'; break; fi; sleep 1; done; if ! docker exec cheenhub-postgres pg_isready -U postgres -d cheenhub >/dev/null 2>&1; then echo 'Postgres did not become ready within 60 seconds.' >&2; exit 1; fi; trap 'kill 0' INT TERM EXIT; CHEENHUB_JWT_KEY_ID=dev-ed25519-1 CHEENHUB_JWT_PUBLIC_KEY_BASE64=FyeAHCHdj3LQJcxcJv1Zo3mW8m+kqBGytTetC2NCIBU= dx serve --package cheenhub_client & cargo watch -x 'run -p cheenhub_backend' & wait

label: CheenHub: dev services
command: trap 'kill 0' INT TERM EXIT; CHEENHUB_JWT_KEY_ID=dev-ed25519-1 CHEENHUB_JWT_PUBLIC_KEY_BASE64=FyeAHCHdj3LQJcxcJv1Zo3mW8m+kqBGytTetC2NCIBU= dx serve --package cheenhub_client & cargo watch -x 'run -p cheenhub_backend' & wait

label: CheenHub: ensure Docker Desktop
command: if docker info >/dev/null 2>&1; then echo 'Docker Desktop is already running.'; exit 0; fi; echo 'Docker Desktop is not running; starting it...'; if command -v systemctl >/dev/null 2>&1; then systemctl --user start docker-desktop >/dev/null 2>&1 || true; fi; if ! docker info >/dev/null 2>&1 && command -v docker-desktop >/dev/null 2>&1; then nohup docker-desktop >/tmp/cheenhub-docker-desktop.log 2>&1 & fi; for attempt in $(seq 1 90); do if docker info >/dev/null 2>&1; then echo 'Docker Desktop is ready.'; exit 0; fi; sleep 1; done; echo 'Docker Desktop did not become ready within 90 seconds.' >&2; exit 1

label: CheenHub: ensure Postgres
command: if docker ps --format '{{.Names}}' | grep -qx 'cheenhub-postgres'; then echo 'Postgres container is already running.'; exit 0; fi; if docker ps -a --format '{{.Names}}' | grep -qx 'cheenhub-postgres'; then echo 'Starting existing Postgres container...'; docker start cheenhub-postgres >/dev/null; else echo 'Creating Postgres container...'; docker run --name cheenhub-postgres -e POSTGRES_USER=postgres -e POSTGRES_PASSWORD=mysecretpassword -e POSTGRES_DB=cheenhub -p 5432:5432 -v cheenhub-postgres-data:/var/lib/postgresql/data -d postgres:16 >/dev/null; fi; for attempt in $(seq 1 60); do if docker exec cheenhub-postgres pg_isready -U postgres -d cheenhub >/dev/null 2>&1; then echo 'Postgres is ready.'; exit 0; fi; sleep 1; done; echo 'Postgres did not become ready within 60 seconds.' >&2; exit 1

label: CheenHub: migrate database
command: set -a; [ -f .env ] && source .env; set +a; cargo run -p cheenhub_migrations -- up

label: CheenHub: create git tag
command: printf 'Git tag name: '; read -r tag; if [ -z "$tag" ]; then echo 'Tag name is required.' >&2; exit 1; fi; if git rev-parse -q --verify "refs/tags/$tag" >/dev/null; then echo "Tag already exists: $tag" >&2; exit 1; fi; git tag "$tag" && echo "Created git tag: $tag"
